question: What is the effective date of the Agreement?
answer_paragraph:
INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY ASSIGNMENT AGREEMENT
This Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into on February 10, 2023 (the "Effective Date"), by and between NovaTech Inc., a Delaware corporation with its principal place of business at 123 Main Street, Anytown, CA 12345 ("NovaTech"), and Emily J. Lee, an individual with an address at 456 Elm Street, Othertown, CA 67890 ("Assignor").
